channel.title: Welcome to the Official SPCC Computer Club Website on SPCC Computer Club
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to the Official SPCC Computer Club Website on SPCC Computer Club

item.title: F3 CL Python Assignment 4: Lists
item.description: /List: the most used complex data type in python/ What is a list? # Data types # In Python, there are generally tow kinds of data type: Atomic and Collective. Atomic data types, as its name suggests, atomic data types cannot be further broken down. For example a boolean True or an int 69.

item.title: F3 CL Python Assignment 1: Introduction to Python
item.description: An Introduction to Python: A Powerful Programming Language What is Python? Why Python? # Powerful # Python is a powerful scripting langugae. You can use it to create games, web scrapers and automate works. You can use it to build softwares and web applications. You can use it for scientific computation and data analysis.

item.title: Determining the Degrees of Separation Apart two Actors
item.description: CS50’s Original Page Source Code Problem Statement # Determine the degrees of separation apart two actors, for example: Loading data... Data loaded. Name: Morgan Freeman Name: Denzel Washington 1 degrees of separation. 1: Morgan Freeman and Denzel Washington starred in Glory Loading data... Data loaded. Name: Elvis Presley Name: Kevin Bacon Which 'Kevin Bacon'?

item.title: Analytic Rectangular Geometry
item.description: Rectangle Object # A rectangle can be defined by two points: $(x_1, y_1)$ the bottom-left point and $(x_2, y_2)$ the top right point, where $x_2 \geq x_1$ and $y_2 \geq y_1$. The area of it is given by $(x_2 - x_1) \cdot (y_2 - y_1)$. class rectangle: def __init__(self): self.x_1, self.

/Write leads here/ Heading # Subheading # Link: Python Codeblock: # Python hello_world.py print('Hello, World!') Put the images in the Google Drive; Put down insert image <image_name> at the line you want to insert the image
